name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Has 2 Sockets
Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
7% increased Attack Speed
+58 to maximum Life
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills that hit enemies, causing them to gain bonuses while you have unholy resonance of lightning, physical and chaos, and to grant unholy resonance of damage types other than the highest one in a hit. There is a maximum of 50 unholy resonance for each damage type. Cannot support triggered skills, instant skills, orb skills, brands, skills with a reservation, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods:
Hits with Supported Skills for which the highest Damage Type is Lightning, Physical or Chaos cause you to gain 25 Unholy Resonance of the other types per second for 2 seconds
Lose 5 Unholy Resonance per second of each type you are not gaining
Supported Skills deal 7% more Damage per 10 of lowest Unholy Resonance
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Lightning and Chaos Resistance while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
Supported Skills have 90% chance to ignore Enemy Physical Damage Reduction while each Unholy Resonance is at least 25
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: It was a delicate balancing act for Malachai to ensure the loyalty
of his three students - each as ambitious as they were depraved.

name: Behemoth Keep
implicitMods: 12% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage
explicitMods: +115 to maximum Energy Shield
126% increased Energy Shield
+48% to Cold Resistance
10% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills

properties.name: Attack, Projectile, AoE, Melee, Strike, Fire

socketedItems.secDescrText: Infuses your melee weapon with molten energies to attack with physical and fire damage. This attack causes balls of molten magma to launch forth from the enemies you hit, divided amongst all enemies hit by the strike. These will deal area attack damage to enemies where they land.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Elemental Damage with Attacks
explicitMods: Fires 4 Projectiles
60% of Physical Damage Converted to Fire Damage
Projectiles deal 50% less Damage with Hits and Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee attack skills, making them repeat three times when used, targeting a random enemy each time. Cannot support Vaal skills, channelling skills, travel skills, retaliation skills or triggered skills.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Repeat 3 additional times
Supported Skills have 55% more Melee Attack Speed
Supported Skills deal 20% less Attack Damage
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Melee Damage
First Repeat of Supported Skills deals 22% more Damage
Second Repeat of Supported Skills deals 44% more Damage
Third Repeat of Supported Skills deals 66% more Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: Zana watched in awe as her father spoke. With each word,
he seemed to grow larger and more frightening, drawing
increasingly fervorous responses from his rapt audience.

implicitMods: 8% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Chaos Damage
explicitMods: +59 to maximum Energy Shield
141% increased Energy Shield

10% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
craftedMods: Light Radius is based on Energy Shield instead of Life

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: Base Aura radius is 2.8 metres
53% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate
While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 20% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants additional energy shield and increased energy shield recharge rate to you and your allies.
explicitMods: +2 metres to radius
You and nearby allies gain 221 additional Energy Shield
You and nearby Allies gain 30% increased Energy Shield Recharge Rate
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText:
Supports any skill gem.
Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
explicitMods: +2 to Level of Supported Skill Gems
+16% to Quality of Supported Skill Gems
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "Although we are two bodies, we are of one mind, one heart, drifting
through the cosmos, in search of purpose. The moment we cross paths,
both fleeting and eternal, our eyes are opened to our potential."

explicitMods: 5% increased Attack Speed

+90 to maximum Energy Shield
109% increased Energy Shield
+2% to all maximum Resistances

properties.name: Attack, AoE, Melee, Movement, Travel, Slam

socketedItems.secDescrText: Jump through the air, damaging and knocking back enemies with your weapon where you land. Enemies you would land on are pushed out of the way. Requires an Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Sword or Staff.
explicitMods: 39% increased Stun Duration against Enemies that are on Full Life
+0.55 seconds to Attack Time
Base radius is 1.5 metres
Damaging Hits always Stun Enemies that are on Full Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Conjures an icy barrier that chills enemies when they hit you. You drop chilled ground while moving, and take less Fire and Physical damage while stationary.
explicitMods: Base duration is 4.50 seconds
Buff grants 21% less Physical Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Buff grants 21% less Fire Damage taken from Hits while stationary
Chill Enemy for 0.5 seconds when Hit, reducing their Action Speed by 30%
Buff grants Immunity to Freeze
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Deals 990 to 2970 Lightning Damage
Chains +1 Times
Buff grants +26% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield
Buff grants Immunity to Shock
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Ephemeral Edge
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
explicitMods: +10 to Intelligence
Adds 1 to 75 Lightning Damage
50% increased Global Critical Strike Chance
47% increased maximum Energy Shield
25% reduced maximum Life
Attacks with this Weapon have Added Maximum Lightning Damage equal to 15% of Player's Maximum Energy Shield
flavourText: In the rift between future and past,
life passes quickly.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Place a Frost Shield that drains your energy shield for one second or until you run out, gaining stages while this drain occurs. The Frost Shield takes some damage from hits in place of you and allies while in its area. Enemies in the area are Chilled. You can only have one Frost Shield active at once.
explicitMods: Base duration is 10.00 seconds
20% increased Effect of Cold Ailments
20% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies in Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
60% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies outside Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
You gain +0.4% to Spell Critical Strike Chance per Stage while in Area
Frost Shield has 1000 maximum Life per Stage
Maximum 4 Stages
Gains 1 Stage every 0.3 seconds while you are losing Energy Shield
You lose 800 Energy Shield per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Cold, Travel, Blink, AoE

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving Chilled ground in an area at both ends of the teleport. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 9 to 14 Cold Damage
Base duration is 3.00 seconds

15% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Normal or Magic Enemy in Area
80% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate for each Rare or Unique Enemy in Area
10% increased maximum travel distance

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.

Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
